sample_reviews.title: Subscription BS
sample_reviews.snippet: HP requires a subscription to print. The home printer industry was already a scam, it’s just even more evident now.

sample_reviews.title: Easy install

It’s an easy install.

I usually suffer from great fright while dealing with printers.

I look forward to using the Hewlett-Packard 6555E printer.
